data.author: aosmw
data.message:
Fix cmake install locations for ROS2/colcon

* Work around non-standard (for ROS2) location of toplevel include file
fields2cover.h that refers to sub includes via "relative paths" mechanism
by also including $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include/fields2cover> in
target_include_directores(Fields2Cover ...

* Install cmake support files in ROS2 standard/convention directory
share/fields2cover/cmake

Signed-off-by: Mike Wake <michael.wake@aosgrp.com.au>

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Remove pessimizing std::move.

When compiling on gcc 13.2, it complains that the std::move
in these locations are pessimizing, since it can do
copy elision.  Just get rid of the unnecessary std::move
in these cases.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@gmail.com>
